contractName: The Attack Of The Polymer-Coated Man II
shortDescription: For the next scene, the polymer-coated man will start their path of bloodthirsty revenge by finding and slaying the Chancellor of the Capellan Confederation who was responsible for their torment by ordering their transformation into cyborgs. Just find and shoot all Liao targets on sight, including the buildings where the Chancellor is supposed to be hiding after he escaped from the supply depot you previously blew up.
longDescription: Yang has been both angry, happy and sad about this holovid, which sums up pretty well his relationship with his former nation.

dialogueContent.words: I am Maximillian Liao, First Lord of the Star League, Chancellor of the Capellan Confederation.
You are my creation and my sons, you are loyal servants of House Liao and always will be.
Join me and we will conquer the entire Inner Sphere!
Fail to do so and you will be swiftly destroyed by my Death Commandos!
And 'El Diablo' is dead. That should make the First Prince happy.
Cut! We are going to have to repeat the whole scene!
Accept my offer and I shall make you rich, my new Strategic Military Director, and lead my Star League legions to the final victory!
Do not refuse my offer, I warn you, for they call me El Diablo, devil in person!
Truly interlinked, but now you mercenaries must leave.
You call this a challenge? The Celestial Throne can't be destroyed!
Death Commandos, fulfill your heavenly mandate.
You are machines and will be defeated by true men!
